title: Cancel or downgrade your subscription
body:
# Cancel or downgrade your subscription

To change your subscription plan:

1. Go to **Billing > Subscription**.
2. Click **Change plan** to downgrade, or **Cancel subscription** to end it.
3. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle; cancellations remain active until the end of the current paid period.
4. Confirm the change — you'll receive an email confirmation.

Cancelling does not delete your account or data; you can resubscribe at any time from the same page.
